canonical_question: How do you integrate Concur/Expensify/Navan with ERP for GL coding and approval workflows?
aliases: How to connect T&E expense system to ERP for journal posting?
SAP Concur Financial Integration API for expense report GL coding
Corporate card reconciliation with ERP clearing accounts
Expense approval workflow integration with NetSuite/SAP/Oracle

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Concur User v1 Form Fields sunset June 2026; Brex acquired by Capital One Jan 2026

constraints: SAP Concur Financial Integration API returns approved documents only -- cannot pull draft or submitted reports
Expensify API requires partnerUserID/partnerUserSecret pair -- no OAuth flow
Navan direct ERP integrations limited to NetSuite, Sage Intacct, QuickBooks Online
Brex Accounting API requires two-way sync -- unidirectional export not supported for real-time
Ramp accounting sync supports NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Oracle Fusion, QBO, Xero -- SAP requires custom build
Corporate card feeds arrive 24-48h after transaction -- never treat as real-time
Multi-currency expense reports require exchange rate source agreement before go-live

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs AP invoice automation, not employee expense reports
User needs payroll integration for reimbursement via paycheck

depends_on.label: AP Automation Integration (invoice side of T&E)

often_confused_with.label: AP Automation -- handles vendor invoices, not employee expenses

inputs_needed.question: Which T&E platform are you using?
Which ERP or accounting system is the target?
What's the integration scope?
options: Expense report GL coding and journal posting only
